cn.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

hk.description:
歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！
你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 
找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 
要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。
美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

hk.releaseNotes:
-Performance improvements.
-Audio fixes and enhancements.
-Important: Please delete the old table if you have used it previously.
hk.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

hk.description:
聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

hk.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

威猛全能的巫師威之難回來了！開啟一趟史詩之旅，召集他的軍隊，完成他的陰謀計劃…木哈哈哈。讓整個王國知道誰才是真正的頭目！奮力向前，征服新的領地，還有那些不錯的舊領地。在這款幽默史詩的經典塔防遊戲中，直面強大敵人的帝國，對抗超威的頭目！
遊戲特色

- 22種具有特殊技能與力量的新防禦塔。
- 選擇防禦塔武器，組合成超強破壞力的裝備，阻止敵人進攻！
- 三個大陸上的42個挑戰關卡，已準備好等你來！
- 17個強大的英雄，毫不猶豫聽候你的調遣。
- 超過60種死敵來測驗你的智慧與戰術技巧。
- 在最傳奇的頭目戰鬥中，打敗17位威武的魔王，包圍你的王國！
- 新的能力與援軍，助你殲滅敵人。
- 10多種小物件與法器，在戰鬥中提供額外優勢。
- 30種升級可訓練軍隊到最佳狀態。
- 60多種成就，隱藏的秘密和其他好玩的東東等你來發現！
- 你的黑塔里沒有WiFi？不用擔心，可以離線玩哦！

這裡有魔王威之難最新訊息：
https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/

tw.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

tw.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

tw.description:
Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

==企業版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理組態： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中
 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） 
 - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務
 - 無廣告

==主要功能== 

智慧掃描： 

 - 檔案檢測和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理
 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） 
 - 批量掃描

 PDF建立和編輯： 

 - 文件合併和拆分
 - 多頁PDF創建
 - 照片和PDF匯入

安全和隱私： 

 - 裝置上文件處理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密碼加密

文件組織： 

 - 文件標記
 - 元數據和內容搜索
 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 

匯出：

 - 電子郵件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自動後台自動匯出

OCR（文本識別）：

 + 文字提取
 + 創建可搜尋的PDF
 + 掃描名片和建立連絡人

==關於我們== 

The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。

==定價和法律==

您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

tw.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

us.description:
聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

us.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

tr.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

tr.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

tr.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ALS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

### Core Features ###
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality


### Fully Customizable for Your Practice ###
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour


### First Responder & Post-Code Tools ###
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review


### Evidence-Based Flowcharts ###
ALS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on ALS and Post-Resuscitation Care guidelines from AHA and ERC


### Built for Healthcare Professionals ###
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.


### Support & Legal ###
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

tr.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

pt.description:
Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista. 

Seu agente patogênico acabou de contaminar o 'Paciente zero'. Agora você deve acabar com a história da humanidade evoluindo para uma mortal Praga global, enquanto se adapta a tudo que a humanidade pode fazer para se defender. 

Brilhantemente executado, com jogabilidade inovadora e construido especificamente para iPhone e iPad, Plague Inc. é uma evolução do gênero de estratégia e leva os jogos em dispositivos móves (e você) a novos níveis. É Você contra o mundo - só o forte sobrevive! 

◈◈◈ Jogo #1 globalmente com mais de 500 milhões de jogos jogados ◈◈◈

Plague Inc. é um hit global com mais de meio milhão de classificações de 5 estrelas e reportagens em jornais como The Economist, New York Post, Boston Herald, The Guardian e London Metro! 

O desenvolvedor de Plague Inc. foi convidado a falar no CDC em Atlanta sobre os modelos de doenças do jogo!

▶ “O jogo cria um mundo convincente que engaja o público em tópicos sérios de saúde pública” – The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
▶ “Melhor jogo para tablet de 2012” - New York Daily News 
▶ “Plague Inc. vai captar sua atenção de todas as formas certas, e vai mantê-la” - Touch Arcade 
▶ “Não há como negar o alto nível de qualidade de Plague Inc.” - Modojo 
▶ “Plague Inc. não deveria ser tão divertido como é” – London Metro 
▶ “Vai deixar você na esperança de destruir o mundo, tudo em nome de um pouco de diversão” – Pocket Lint 
▶ “A jogabilidade de Plague Inc.'s é contagiosa” - Slide to Play 
▶ Vencedor – “Melhor jogo do ano” – Pocket Gamer
▶ “Matar bilhões nunca foi tão divertido” – IGN 

◈◈◈

Características: 
● Lindos gráficos retina com uma interface bastante refinada (Contágio garantido) 
● Mundo hiperrealistas, altamente detalhado, com IA avançada (Gerenciamento de epidemia) 
● Sistema abrangente de ajudar e tutorial (Eu sou a lenda da ajuda) 
● 12 diferentes tipos de doenças com estratégias radicalmente diferentes para dominar (12 Macacos?) 
● Funcionalidade completa de Salvamento/Carregamento (28 salvamentos depois!) 
● 50+ países para contaminar, centenas de caractetísticas para evoluir e milhares de eventos mundiais para se adaptar (Evolução pandêmica) 
● Suporte total ao jogo 
● Atualizações de expansão acrescentam o Verme Neurax que controla a mente, o Vírus Necroa que produz zumbis, Corridas de velocidade e Cenários da vida real!
● Você consegue salvar o mundo? Assuma o controle e vença uma doença mundial na nossa maior expansão!
● Enfrente as Doenças Diárias, ganhe melhorias poderosas e compita contra o mundo no Modo Surto!


Traduzido para Inglês, Alemão, Espanhol, Português do Brasil, Italiano, Francês, Japonês, Coreano e Russo. (mais em breve) 

P.S. Dê um tapa nas suas costas se entendeu todos as referências da literatura do tema! 

Preço promocional especial para celebrar o fato de ser o 5º jogo de iPhone mais popular de 2015!

pt.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

pt.releaseNotes:
Genius Scan 8.9 improves day-to-day reliability and polish, with a focus on stability throughout the app and the style of several visual elements so the app feels even more refined.

IMPROVED

- For OneDrive Export Shortcuts, Genius Scan now shows a warning banner when opening the destination picker to explain that some folders may not appear because of Microsoft changes.

FIXED

- Fixed an issue where the toolbar could be disabled after previewing a page in the Page selection screen.
- Fully restored QR code detection in the camera screen.
- Fixed a bug that could repeatedly show the Subscription sheet after renewal for some users with monthly subscriptions.
- Prevented blurry thumbnail images that could occur in grid view in some cases.
pt.description:
O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas.

*** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas ***

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

pt.description:
Desenvolvido para instituições, profissionais e alunos que buscam otimizar as manobras de RCP durante uma PCR. O timer foi elaborado e amplamente testado para ter um layout prático, rápido e intuitivo, mesmo no cenário agitado e de elevado estresse de uma PCR.
 
Funções:
- 2 CHRONÔMETROS: timer com 2 relógios distintos para COMPRESSÕES TORÁCICAS e EPINEFRINA, com feedback visual amplo quando excedidos os limites de tempo 
- CUSTOMIZÁVEL: permite adicionar medicamentos, procedimentos e ritmos da sua escolha, separados por categorias
- MÚLTIPLOS AJUSTES disponíveis para o Code Blue se adequar às suas preferências
- MODO FIRST RESPONDER: para aqueles que prestam primeiro atendimento em ambiente extra-hospitalar, opção para salvar as coordenadas dos atendimentos e visualizar no mapa interativa. 
- FLUXOGRAMAS: fluxogramas interativas com as recomendações presentes nos principais guidelines para RCP / PCR do AHA ACLS e ERC. 
- LOG/TIMELINE: resumo prontamente disponível em layout de fácil visualização acessível durante a ocorrência, permitindo manter total controle mesmo em uma PCR complexa de longa duração
- HISTÓRICO: histórico de atendimentos com resumo e indicadores de qualidade de assistência, permitindo revisão e aprimoramento dos atendimentos por equipes e seus gestores
- RELATÓRIO PDF: relatório em PDF com resumo e timeline completo



POLÍTICA DE PRIVACIDADE (PRIVACY POLICY): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy/


TERMOS E CONDIÇÕES GERAIS DE USO E DE COMPRA (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula/


CONTATO PARA SUPORTE E DÚVIDAS: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.coml@gmail.com

pt.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.
